configuration.autoReconnecto.title: AutoReconnect Settings
configuration.autoReconnecto.autoReconne: Enable or disable auto reconnect feature
configuration.autoReconnecto.reconnectDe: How many seconds to wait before reconnecting after disconnect (0-10 seconds)
configuration.autoReconnecto.commandDela: Delay in seconds before sending commands after joining server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command1.de: First command to automatically send after chatting on server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command2.de: Second command to automatically send after chatting on server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command3.de: Third command to automatically send after chatting on server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command4.de: Fourth command to automatically send after chatting on server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command5.de: Fifth command to automatically send after chatting on server
configuration.autoReconnecto.command6.de: Sixth command to automatically send after chatting on server
autoreconnect.message.reconnect_restored: Player joined server, auto reconnect restored
autoreconnect.message.input_detected: §e[AutoReconnecto] §c✗ Input detected during reconnect wait, cancelled
autoreconnect.message.no_server_data: §e[AutoReconnecto] §c✗ No saved server info, cannot reconnect
autoreconnect.message.retry_later: §e[AutoReconnecto] §c✗ Reconnect unsuccessful, will retry in 10 seconds...
autoreconnect.message.input_pause: §e[AutoReconnecto] §c✗ Input detected in main menu, auto reconnect paused
autoreconnect.message.disabled_or_paused: Auto reconnect disabled or paused, skipping
autoreconnect.message.pause_screen_disco: Disconnected in pause menu, likely player quit, no reconnect
autoreconnect.message.player_quit: Player quit detected, no auto reconnect
autoreconnect.message.config_update_fail: §e[AutoReconnecto] §cConfig update failed: Invalid config ID or value
autoreconnect.message.command_default_wa: §e[AutoReconnecto] §c⚠ Command slot(s) §b{0}§c set to default value (/login), total §b{1}§c slot(s), please set password(s) or remove and rejoin the server!
